title: Portfolio & Business Capabilities
summary: Executive view of GPC capabilities and how portfolio pieces fit together before you deep-dive individual products.

sections.heading: Capability narrative
sections.body: Start with the business capability story, then branch into product modules (connectivity, security, UC, etc.).

sections.heading: Product marketing library (extracted)
sections.body: The “(1)” zip is the broad datasheet library organized by product folder (Internet, Ethernet, SD-WAN, UC, etc.). Use it as the canonical collateral index when building customer-facing decks.

guidde.notes: Optional Guidde: map a customer problem to a portfolio stack (DIA + managed security + UC).
